# The Precious Intelligence Academy

> A digital institution for the disciplines of luxury: precious metals, bullion, gemstones, jewellery, horology, and luxury retail.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Academy and its Institutes.
- [The Institutes](/institutes): Eight self contained programmes.
- [Precious Metals Institute](/institutes/precious-metals): Gold, silver, platinum.
- [Bullion Institute](/institutes/bullion): Bars, coins, markets.
- [Numismatics Institute](/institutes/numismatics): Rare and commemorative coinage.
- [Gemstones Institute](/institutes/gemstones): Diamonds, opals, coloured stones.
- [Jewellery Institute](/institutes/jewellery): Design, craft, provenance.
- [Horology Institute](/institutes/horology): Swiss watchmaking.
- [Luxury Retail Institute](/institutes/luxury-retail): Clienteling and high value sales.
- [Artificial Intelligence Institute](/institutes/artificial-intelligence): AI for the luxury industry.
- [Governance Charter](/governance): Legal, ethical, and compliance charter.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How personal data is collected and protected.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): Terms that govern use of the Academy.
